text:
LINE_PRCDR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Medicare-Fee-for-Service-Payment/PhysicianFeeSched/PFS-Relative-
Value-Files.html 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The variable called line procedure code system/nomenclature (LINE_PRCDR_CD_SYS) is used to 
identify whether a CPT or HCPCS code is used. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
